title: ZMCore
description: Simple mod for my skyblock modpack
body:
ZMCore is a simple mod that add new ore type - dust ore!

*This mod is not very applicable on its own, because a special block is used to produce dust*

You can convert dust into ore with purifier:

![Alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CetrKzyL/images/6007562fcf9238903804e163bf6d26236bbb82fc.gif 'purifier')

Also you can convert dust into dead bush to create from it charcoil:

![Alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CetrKzyL/images/8565120f54d4a284facfee36cf0a8c49e720680a.gif 'dust solvent')
